GenerateArtifactDto.cs.Label: Data Transfer Object
GenerateArtifactDto.cs.Description: This dto was designed to be immutable once received to avoid any unintentional changes and includes validation attributes used in model binding to ensure required values are present.

NoteDtos.Label: Required Attributes
NoteDtos.Text: The [Required] attribute ensures the property cannot be null, an empty string, or a string of only white-space characters. It will throw a validation exception and displays an error message if validation fails.

NoteDtos.Label: Init-Only Properties
NoteDtos.Text: The user-uploaded file name and content have no reason to ever change so properties are init-only to ensure their values cannot be modified after the object is created.

NoteDtos.Label: Default Assignment
NoteDtos.Text: This assignment to default here just provides a valid syntax to apply the null-forgiving operator and remove any nullability warnings. This is safe because values for both properties are already required and cannot be modified so they should never be null.
